case_title: 720 BAKER I1, LLC VS. CHRISTOPHER LAKE ET AL

docket_entries.description: UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR JUDGMENT UNDER SEC 1169 C.C.P., IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF 720 BAKER I1, LLC RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT LAKE, CHRISTOPHER THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: 720 BAKER STREET, #G, CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO, CA 94115, LEASE FORFEITED, ***JUDGMENT APPLIES TO ALL OCCUPANTS OF THE PREMISES INCLUDING TENANTS, SUBTENANTS IF ANY, AND NAMED CLAIMANTS IF ANY (CODE OF CIV. PROC., 715.010, 1169, AND 1174.3)***; SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT
DECLARATION OF DANIEL R. STERN, ESQ. RE COPY OF LEASE AGREEMENT FILED BY PLAINTIFF 720 BAKER I1, LLC
DECLARATION OF DANIEL R. STERN, ESQ. IN SUPPORT OF WRIT OF POSSESSION / $43.76 PER DAY FILED BY PLAINTIFF 720 BAKER I1, LLC
UNLAWFUL DETAINER - RESIDENTIAL, COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF 720 BAKER I1, LLC AS TO DEFENDANT LAKE, CHRISTOPHER DOES 1 TO 10 SUMMONS ISSUED, JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED
SUMMONS ON COMPLAINT, PREJUDGMENT CLAIM OF RIGHT OF POSSESSION FILED BY PLAINTIFF 720 BAKER I1, LLC SERVED SEP-14-2018, POSTING AND MAILING AS TO DEFENDANT LAKE, CHRISTOPHER
REQUEST FOR ENTRY OF DEFAULT/DEFAULT ENTERED, CLERK'S JUDGMENT REQUESTED, DECLARATION OF NON-MILITARY STATUS AS TO DEFENDANT LAKE, CHRISTOPHER
EXECUTION FOR POSSESSION OF REAL PROPERTY ISSUED TO SAN FRANCISCO COUNTY AS TO DEFENDANT LAKE, CHRISTOPHER
